## Execution Order (respecting dependencies)

```
1-1 → 1-2 → 1-3 → 1-4
                    ├── 2-1
                    ├── 2-2
                    ├── 3-1 → 3-2
                    ├── 4-1 → 4-2 → 4-3
                    ├── 5-1
                    └── 5-2
                         └── (all above complete) → 6-1 → 6-2 → 6-3 → 7-1
1-1 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 7-2
                                                             7-1 + 7-2 → 7-3
```

Phase 1 tasks must complete in order (1-1 → 1-2 → 1-3 → 1-4). After 1-4, tasks 2-1, 2-2, 3-1, 4-1, 5-1, and 5-2 can proceed in parallel. Task 7-2 can be done any time after 1-1.
